text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Arriving at a Kansai food fair, I spot<n>Tamamo
Cross and Super Creek<n>touring the stalls.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Tamtam. This stall's selling the<n>grilled squid
you were looking for.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Good eye, Creek! Hello,<n>ma'am! Hit
me with the goods!

text_block_list.name: Food Stall Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, welcome... The Osaka-style grilled<n>squid, right?
Ya both havin' one?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Um, you seem kinda down,<n>ma'am.
Somethin' wrong?

text_block_list.name: Food Stall Lady
text_block_list.text:
Sucks to say, but business hasn't<n>been great. The
folk here can't tell<n>the difference between
Osaka-style<n>grilled squid 'n their local stuff.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I bet you've been pourin' your<n>heart into
makin' these... Now I'm<n>feelin' down too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I know! I'll go 'n attract some<n>customers for ya!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If that's the plan, I'll help. We can<n>accomplish
more as a pair.

text_block_list.name: Food Stall Lady
text_block_list.text:
You'd really do that? Well, if you two<n>aren't the
kindest souls I ever met!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Just wait—you'll be up to<n>your ears in
customers before long!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! Can I interest you in<n>some delish
grilled squid?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Grilled squid? But you can get that<n>anywhere...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Think again! This isn't your ordinary<n>grilled squid!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's an Osakan specialty, grilled in a<n>batter like a
crepe! Buy now to get a<n>bargain—one pack for a
measly five<n>million yen!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam, is that true? Is it really a<n>luxury cuisine?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Like hell it is! I'm doin' a bit, duh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But as a grilled squid connoisseur,I'd pay five million for this—andthat's a guarantee!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam... I didn't know grilled squid<n>got you so...
fired up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I—wait, was that a joke? That's<n>s'posed to
be my turf!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I love the comedy act! Maybe<n>I'll give that
squid a try!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y'mean it?! Then that stall over<n>there's where
you wanna go!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, let's keep this rolling! You<n>there, hot stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, let's keep this rolling! You<n>there, hot stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, aren't you a trainer from<n>Tracen? Were you
watchin' us?
choice_data_list: Yeah. You sure know how to advertise.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's 'cause business is more thanjust numbers—you gotta reallyconnect to people!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But we're just chatting to them,<n>aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but they can tell we're doin' it<n>with heart!
We wouldn't have that if<n>we didn't wanna help
the squid lady!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but they can tell we're doin' it<n>with heart!
We wouldn't have that if<n>we didn't wanna help
the squid lady!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for yer patronage! Don't hold<n>back—eat till
you're bursting!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Having fun, Tamtam?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Course I am! Business done right<n>makes
everyone happy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm sellin' squid 'n smiles—nothin'<n>beats that!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Course! I bet the squid lady's<n>grinnin' ear to ear
right now!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're such a lovely girl,<n>Tamtam. Come
here, let me pat your<n>head! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Da hell?! Quit it with the baby<n>treatment!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Save the praise for later—we've still<n>got squid to
sell, yeah?!
